title: Wood Decorations
description: Add new wood decorative blocks to minecraft.
body:
# Wood Deco
Wood deco is a mod that add new wood decorative blocks to minecraft.
## What does it add?
it add a polished planks, bricks and tile block made of wood, with slab/stairs for all of the blocks.
## Want to add compat to other mods? 
it's quite simple, create the textures, create a list of Wood Types, register them to my mod, call the datagen to generate the model, recipes and others for your new wood types.
